title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy
notes:
Crashes after splash screen, likely requires nvapi and nvapi64 to be 
disabled and Proton to have a updated Wine version. Works on Wine 
Staging Esync 3.14 and DXVK 0.70

title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy
notes:
Need to start steam in offline mode.
Game might need to be started with -4kb argument first time.

title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy
notes: Running in Offline Mode is mandatory for stability. "-4kb" no longer required, DXVK can switch between fullscreen, windowed, and borderless window fine now. Threaded workloads slower than Wine Esync 3.14 causing dips below 60fps which can be fixed with newer upstream Wine. Level "Un-Bearable" is broken.

title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy
notes: You have to run steam in offline mode

title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy
notes: Needs offline mode, -4kf or -4kb launch option for first launch, some graphical glitches on loading screens and start menu. Aside from that, the game runs fine.
Has to be started in offline mode, but works fine after that.
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: Game has to be run in offline mode, or it will crash. Performance is good. Controllers are not being detected, unless buttons are binded to keyboard keys in controller config.
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: Runs great with Proton 3.16, offline mode is no longer necessary
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: No graphical issues that I could see, the performance did seem to be worse than on Windows. Alt-tabbing caused the game window to be cropped when switching back to it, restarting the game seemed to be the only fix,
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: I just played a little in one level, but except the intro that the audio goes out of sync, nothing else seems to fail.
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: Everything work great except the mouse
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: The game starts, loads only a few levels, but when it does not load it remains on the black screen, but the pause menu works, but with GTX 1060 Nvidia work all
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: Loads to title screen, then crashes.
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: Runs perfectly on 396.54.09 Nvidia drivers. No offline mode needed anymore. Un-Bearable level still broken.
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes:
- The firstly available levels, N. Sanity Beach and Stormy Ascent, do not load (black screen)
- Does not register mouse clicks on Fullscreen or Windowed Fullscreen modes.
- Does not register gamepad inputs.
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: The game ran without any issues right from the gate. There were a few performance hiccups but none of them lasted anymore than a second or two. Absolutely playable.
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes:
- The firstly available levels, N. Sanity Beach and Stormy Ascent, do not load (black screen)
- Does not register mouse input on Fullscreen or Windowed Fullscreen modes.
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: Works fine without any tweaking
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes:
Game crashes immediately after title screen, or shortly after loading a level.

Developer intro video has de-synchronized audio
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: Game works with both keyboard and controllers, frequent visual stutters prevent comfortable play. Requires Esync to be disabled to load game properly.
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes:
The following levels are the only levels that do not result in a black screen upon being loaded: Crash 1 Intro; The Wumpa Islands; The Warp Room; Crash Dash; Crash 3 Intro. It is possible to access the pause menu in these black screens. Progression is impossible due to the inability to play the starting levels.
Cutscenes' visuals and audio are out of sync the first time they are played (related to dxvk's shader cache?)
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes: Game works fine. Just use steam in offline mode
title: Crash Bandicoot™ N. Sane Trilogy

notes:
A few stutters here and there, but generally very playable. Xbox 360 controller works perfectly. Had to install vulkan mesa drivers to work as vulkan API is not included with AMD mesa drivers. Before vulkan drivers were installed the game immediately crashed on start. 

To install mesa vulkan drivers:
sudo apt install mesa-vulkan-drivers
